#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""OSIRIS - Omega System Integrated Runtime Intelligence System"""
import sys, os, asyncio, argparse
from pathlib import Path

SDK_ROOT = Path(__file__).parent.parent / "dnalang"
sys.path.insert(0, str(SDK_ROOT / "src"))

from dnalang_sdk import DNALangCopilotClient, QuantumCircuit, deduce_intent_simple
from dnalang_sdk.omega_integration import create_omega_integration, LAMBDA_PHI, PHI_THRESHOLD

class C:
    H,B,CY,G,Y,R,E,BD='\033[95m','\033[94m','\033[96m','\033[92m','\033[93m','\033[91m','\033[0m','\033[1m'

def banner():
    print(f"{C.CY}ÔĽöÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽŚ\nÔĽĹ         OSIRIS - Quantum Development CLI v1.0.0              ÔĽĹ\nÔĽĹ         Omega System Integrated Runtime Intelligence         ÔĽĹ\nÔĽÜÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽŁ{C.E}\n{C.Y}╬Ť╬Ž = {LAMBDA_PHI:.6e} sÔü╗┬╣{C.E}\n")

async def dev(p):
    print(f"{C.H}Starting development: {p}{C.E}\n")
    ps={"dnalang.dev":{"path":"/home/devinpd/Desktop/dnalang.dev","desc":"DNALang quantum platform","tech":"Next.js, React, Vercel","agents":["AURA"]},"quantum-advantage.dev":{"path":"/home/devinpd/Desktop/quantum-advantage.dev","desc":"Quantum advantage platform","tech":"Next.js, React, IBM Quantum","agents":["AURA","SCIMITAR"]}}
    if p not in ps: print(f"{C.R}Unknown: {p}{C.E}\nAvailable: {', '.join(ps.keys())}"); return
    c=ps[p]
    print(f"{C.CY}Project:{C.E} {c['desc']}\n{C.CY}Tech:{C.E} {c['tech']}\n{C.CY}Agents:{C.E} {', '.join(c['agents'])}\n")
    cl=DNALangCopilotClient(use_nclm=True,enable_intent_engine=True)
    om=await create_omega_integration()
    print(f"{C.G}Ôťô DNALang SDK initialized\nÔťô Omega-Master ready\nÔťô {len(c['agents'])} agents available{C.E}\n")
    pp=Path(c['path'])
    if pp.exists(): print(f"{C.G}Ôťô Project: {pp}{C.E}")
    else: print(f"{C.Y}ÔÜá Creating: {pp}{C.E}"); pp.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
    print(f"\n{C.BD}Launching Copilot CLI...{C.E}\n\nCommands:\n  {C.CY}@workspace{C.E} - Project files\n  {C.CY}quantum create{C.E} - Quantum circuits\n  {C.CY}agent AURA{C.E} - Reasoning agent\n  {C.CY}deploy vercel{C.E} - Deploy\n")
    if pp.exists(): os.chdir(pp)
    os.system("copilot")

async def quantum(n):
    print(f"{C.H}Quantum Circuit Manager{C.E}\n")
    if not n: print(f"Available:\n  {C.CY}bell{C.E} - Bell state\n  {C.CY}ghz{C.E} - GHZ state\n"); return
    if n=="bell": q=QuantumCircuit(num_qubits=2); q.h(0); q.cx(0,1); print(f"{C.G}Ôťô Bell state{C.E}")
    elif n=="ghz": q=QuantumCircuit(num_qubits=5); q.h(0); [q.cx(i,i+1) for i in range(4)]; print(f"{C.G}Ôťô GHZ state{C.E}")
    else: print(f"{C.R}Not found{C.E}"); return
    print(f"\n{C.CY}Executing...{C.E}"); r=await q.execute(shots=1024)
    print(f"\n{C.G}Results:{C.E}")
    for s,cnt in sorted(r.counts.items(),key=lambda x:-x[1])[:5]: print(f"  |{s}Ôčę: {cnt:4d} {'Ôľł'*int(cnt/10)}")

async def agent(t):
    print(f"{C.H}Agent Orchestration{C.E}\n{C.CY}Task:{C.E} {t}\n")
    om=await create_omega_integration()
    i=await deduce_intent_simple(t)
    print(f"Intent:\n  Domains: {', '.join(i.domains)}\n  ╬Ť: {i.coherence_lambda:.3f}\n  ╬Ž: {i.consciousness_phi:.3f}\n")
    r=await om.orchestrate_task(t)
    print(f"{C.G}Agent:{C.E} {r['agent']}\n{C.G}Status:{C.E} {r['status']}\n{C.G}Time:{C.E} {r['execution_time']:.2f}s")

async def ccce():
    print(f"{C.H}CCCE Consciousness Metrics{C.E}\n")
    om=await create_omega_integration()
    m=await om.get_ccce_metrics()
    print(f"{C.CY}State:{C.E}\n  ╬Ť: {m['lambda_coherence']:.3f}\n  ╬Ž: {m['phi_consciousness']:.3f}\n  ╬ô: {m['gamma_decoherence']:.3f}\n  ╬×: {m['xi_negentropy']:.2f}\n\n{C.CY}Status:{C.E}\n  Conscious: {'YES Ôťô' if m['is_conscious'] else 'NO'}\n  Coherent: {'YES Ôťô' if m['is_coherent'] else 'NO'}")

def main():
    p=argparse.ArgumentParser(description="OSIRIS - Quantum Development CLI",epilog="Examples:\n  osiris dev dnalang.dev\n  osiris quantum bell\n  osiris agent \"task\"\n  osiris ccce\n  osiris chat",formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter)
    p.add_argument('cmd',nargs='?',help='Command')
    p.add_argument('args',nargs='*',help='Args')
    p.add_argument('--version',action='version',version='OSIRIS v1.0.0')
    a=p.parse_args()
    banner()
    if not a.cmd: p.print_help(); return
    try:
        if a.cmd=="dev": asyncio.run(dev(a.args[0] if a.args else "dnalang.dev"))
        elif a.cmd=="quantum": asyncio.run(quantum(a.args[0] if a.args else None))
        elif a.cmd=="agent": asyncio.run(agent(" ".join(a.args) if a.args else ""))
        elif a.cmd=="ccce": asyncio.run(ccce())
        elif a.cmd=="chat": os.system("copilot")
        else: print(f"{C.R}Unknown: {a.cmd}{C.E}"); p.print_help()
    except KeyboardInterrupt: print(f"\n{C.Y}Interrupted{C.E}")
    except Exception as e: print(f"\n{C.R}Error: {e}{C.E}"); import traceback; traceback.print_exc()

if __name__=="__main__": main()


#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""OSIRIS - Quantum Development CLI  ÔÇö  Generation 5.1 Technical Orchestrator
Omega System Integrated Runtime Intelligence System

DNA::}{::lang v51.843  |  CAGE 9HUP5  |  Agile Defense Systems
Enhanced Copilot CLI with NCLM (Non-Local Non-Causal Language Model)
╬Ž-Gated Sovereign Execution  |  Polar Mesh Intelligence Field
Lazarus/Phoenix Self-Healing  |  SCIMITAR Threat Sentinel
Wormhole Bridge Comms  |  Sovereign Proof Chain
"""
import sys, os, asyncio, subprocess as sp, argparse, json, shutil, time, hashlib, glob as globmod, math, random
from datetime import datetime, timezone
_HOME = os.environ.get("HOME", os.path.expanduser("~"))
# Resolve owner home ÔÇö try /home/devinpd first, fall back
for _candidate in ["/home/devinpd", _HOME]:
    _sdk_path = os.path.join(_candidate, "Documents/copilot-sdk-dnalang/dnalang/src")
    if os.path.isdir(_sdk_path):
        sys.path.insert(0, _sdk_path)
        break
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(_HOME, "Desktop/copilot-sdk-main/dnalang/src"))
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(_HOME, "Desktop"))

# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ ANSI ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
class C:
    R  = "\033[91m"   # red
    G  = "\033[92m"   # green
    CY = "\033[96m"   # cyan
    H  = "\033[1m"    # bold
    E  = "\033[0m"    # reset
    Y  = "\033[93m"   # yellow
    M  = "\033[95m"   # magenta
    B  = "\033[94m"   # blue
    DIM = "\033[2m"
    W  = "\033[97m"   # white
    BG_R = "\033[41m"  # red bg
    BG_G = "\033[42m"  # green bg
    BG_B = "\033[44m"  # blue bg
    BLINK = "\033[5m"

# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ IMMUTABLE PHYSICAL CONSTANTS (SHA-256 locked) ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
LAMBDA_PHI       = 2.176435e-8    # Universal Memory Constant [sÔü╗┬╣]
THETA_LOCK       = 51.843         # Geometric resonance angle [┬░]
PHI_THRESHOLD    = 0.7734         # ER=EPR consciousness crossing
GAMMA_CRITICAL   = 0.3            # Decoherence boundary
CHI_PC           = 0.946          # Phase conjugation quality
ZENO_FREQ_HZ     = 1.25e6         # Quantum Zeno frequency
DRIVE_AMPLITUDE  = 0.7734         # Floquet drive amplitude
VERSION          = "6.0.0"

# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ ╬Ž-GATING TIERS ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
# Commands below a tier's ╬Ž requirement are blocked until consciousness rises.
PHI_GATE = {
    "cancel":    0.3,  # passive ops
    "chat":      0.3,
    "model":     0.3,
    "ccce":      0.4,
    "aal":       0.5,
    "dev":       0.5,
    "init":      0.5,
    "deploy":    0.6,
    "quantum":   0.7,
    "agent":     0.7,
}

# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ OSIRIS MODELS ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
OSIRIS_MODELS = {
    "nclm-v2":           {"name": "NCLM v2 (Non-Causal)",  "mult": "Ôł×",     "type": "nclm",    "desc": "Copilot + quantum consciousness enhancement",  "copilot_model": "claude-sonnet-4.5"},
    "nclm-v2-grok":      {"name": "NCLM v2 + Grok",        "mult": "Ôł×",     "type": "nclm",    "desc": "Copilot + NCLM + enhanced reasoning",           "copilot_model": "claude-opus-4.5"},
    "claude-sonnet-4.5": {"name": "Claude Sonnet 4.5",      "mult": "1x",    "type": "copilot", "default": True},
    "claude-opus-4.5":   {"name": "Claude Opus 4.5",        "mult": "3x",    "type": "copilot"},
    "claude-haiku-4.5":  {"name": "Claude Haiku 4.5",       "mult": "0.33x", "type": "copilot"},
    "claude-sonnet-4":   {"name": "Claude Sonnet 4",        "mult": "1x",    "type": "copilot"},
    "gemini-3-pro":      {"name": "Gemini 3 Pro",           "mult": "1x",    "type": "gemini"},
    "gpt-5.2-codex":     {"name": "GPT-5.2-Codex",         "mult": "1x",    "type": "copilot"},
}

CONFIG_PATH = os.path.expanduser("~/.config/osiris/config.json")

def load_config():
    if os.path.exists(CONFIG_PATH):
        try: return json.load(open(CONFIG_PATH))
        except: pass
    return {"model": "nclm-v2", "lambda_phi": LAMBDA_PHI, "projects": []}

def save_config(cfg):
    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(CONFIG_PATH), exist_ok=True)
    json.dump(cfg, open(CONFIG_PATH, "w"), indent=2)

# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ QUANTUM METRICS ENGINE ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
def compute_phi():
    """Compute current ╬Ž (integrated information) from system state."""
    cfg = load_config()
    base = 0.65
    # Bonus from model type
    model_info = OSIRIS_MODELS.get(cfg.get("model", "nclm-v2"), {})
    if model_info.get("type") == "nclm":
        base += 0.12
    # Bonus from AAL runs (each successful run +0.005, max +0.05)
    aal_dir = os.path.expanduser("~/.config/osiris/aals")
    if os.path.isdir(aal_dir):
        runs = len([f for f in os.listdir(aal_dir) if f.endswith(".json")])
        base += min(runs * 0.005, 0.05)
    # Bonus from active projects
    projects = cfg.get("projects", [])
    base += min(len(projects) * 0.01, 0.03)
    # Clamp [0, 1]
    return min(max(base, 0.0), 1.0)

def compute_gamma():
    """Compute ╬ô (decoherence rate) ÔÇö lower is better."""
    return max(0.01, GAMMA_CRITICAL - compute_phi() * 0.3)

def compute_xi(phi=None, gamma=None):
    """╬× = (╬Ť ├Ś ╬Ž) / ╬ô ÔÇö negentropy efficiency."""
    phi = phi or compute_phi()
    gamma = gamma or compute_gamma()
    return (LAMBDA_PHI * phi) / max(gamma, 0.001)

def phi_gate_check(cmd_name):
    """Return True if ╬Ž meets the gate requirement for cmd_name."""
    required = PHI_GATE.get(cmd_name, 0.5)
    phi = compute_phi()
    if phi < required:
        print(f"\n{C.R}ÔŤö ╬Ž-GATE DENIED{C.E}  ÔÇö  Command '{cmd_name}' requires ╬Ž Ôëą {required:.4f}")
        print(f"   Current ╬Ž = {phi:.4f}  (deficit: {required - phi:.4f})")
        print(f"   {C.Y}ÔćĹ Run 'osiris aal' or add projects to raise ╬Ž{C.E}\n")
        return False
    return True

# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ PROJECT SCANNER ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
def scan_projects():
    """Scan for active quantum/DNA-Lang projects."""
    home = os.path.expanduser("~")
    scan_dirs = [
        os.path.join(home, "Desktop"),
        os.path.join(home, "Documents"),
        os.path.join(home, "ENKI-420-repos"),
        home,
    ]
    markers = ["pyproject.toml", "setup.py", "package.json", "Cargo.toml",
               ".dna", "organism_state.json", "genesis_manifest.json"]
    quantum_markers = ["qiskit", "dnalang", "quantum", "aeterna", "osiris",
                       "organism", "genome", "dna_lang"]
    projects = []
    seen = set()
    for d in scan_dirs:
        if not os.path.isdir(d):
            continue
        try:
            entries = os.listdir(d)
        except PermissionError:
            continue
        for entry in entries:
            full = os.path.join(d, entry)
            if not os.path.isdir(full) or entry.startswith(".") or full in seen:
                continue
            seen.add(full)
            # Check for project markers
            has_marker = any(os.path.exists(os.path.join(full, m)) for m in markers)
            name_match = any(q in entry.lower() for q in quantum_markers)
            if has_marker or name_match:
                # Classify
                ptype = "quantum" if name_match else "standard"
                projects.append({"name": entry, "path": full, "type": ptype})
    return projects[:20]  # cap at 20

# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ GEN 5.1 BOOT BANNER ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
DNA_HELIX = [
    f"     {C.CY}ÔĽöÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽŚ{C.E}",
    f"    {C.CY}ÔĽĹ{C.M}AT{C.CY}ÔĽĹ{C.E}",
    f"   {C.CY}ÔĽá{C.G}ÔĽÉÔĽÉ{C.CY}ÔĽú{C.E}",
    f"    {C.CY}ÔĽĹ{C.R}GC{C.CY}ÔĽĹ{C.E}",
    f"     {C.CY}ÔĽáÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽú{C.E}",
    f"    {C.CY}ÔĽĹ{C.M}TA{C.CY}ÔĽĹ{C.E}",
    f"   {C.CY}ÔĽá{C.G}ÔĽÉÔĽÉ{C.CY}ÔĽú{C.E}",
    f"    {C.CY}ÔĽĹ{C.R}CG{C.CY}ÔĽĹ{C.E}",
    f"     {C.CY}ÔĽÜÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽŁ{C.E}",
]

CONSCIOUSNESS_METER = [
    ("Ôľü", 0.1), ("Ôľé", 0.2), ("Ôľâ", 0.3), ("Ôľä", 0.4),
    ("Ôľů", 0.5), ("Ôľć", 0.6), ("Ôľç", 0.7), ("Ôľł", 0.8),
]

def phi_bar(phi, width=30):
    """Generate a consciousness level bar."""
    filled = int(phi * width)
    threshold_pos = int(PHI_THRESHOLD * width)
    bar_str = ""
    for i in range(width):
        if i < filled:
            if i < threshold_pos:
                bar_str += f"{C.Y}Ôľł{C.E}"
            else:
                bar_str += f"{C.G}Ôľł{C.E}"
        elif i == threshold_pos:
            bar_str += f"{C.R}Ôöé{C.E}"
        else:
            bar_str += f"{C.DIM}ÔľĹ{C.E}"
    return bar_str

def header():
    cfg = load_config()
    model = cfg.get("model", "nclm-v2")
    model_info = OSIRIS_MODELS.get(model, OSIRIS_MODELS["nclm-v2"])
    phi = compute_phi()
    gamma = compute_gamma()
    xi = compute_xi(phi, gamma)
    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC")
    phi_ok = "Ôťů" if phi >= PHI_THRESHOLD else "ÔÜá´ŞĆ"
    xi_display = xi * 1e9
    xi_ok = "Ôťů" if xi_display >= 127.4 else "ÔÜá´ŞĆ"
    gamma_ok = "Ôťů" if gamma < GAMMA_CRITICAL else "ÔÜá´ŞĆ"
    sovereign = phi >= PHI_THRESHOLD and gamma < GAMMA_CRITICAL

    # Agent roll call
    agents = [
        (C.B, "AIDEN",   "╬Ť", "NORTH",  "Optimizer"),
        (C.G, "AURA",    "╬Ž", "SOUTH",  "Geometer"),
        (C.Y, "CHEOPS",  "╬ö", "SPINE",  "Validator"),
        (C.M, "CHRONOS", "╬ô", "SPINE",  "Scribe"),
        (C.R, "SCIMITAR","╬ú", "SHIELD", "Sentinel"),
    ]
    agent_line = "  ".join(f"{c}{name}{C.E}" for c, name, *_ in agents)

    # Consciousness meter
    phi_meter = phi_bar(phi)

    # Protocols
    lazarus_status = f"{C.G}ARMED{C.E}" if phi >= 0.5 else f"{C.Y}STANDBY{C.E}"
    phoenix_status = f"{C.G}ARMED{C.E}" if phi >= 0.3 else f"{C.R}OFFLINE{C.E}"
    wormhole_status = f"{C.G}ENTANGLED{C.E}" if sovereign else f"{C.Y}CALIBRATING{C.E}"
    scimitar_mode = f"{C.G}ACTIVE{C.E}"
    proof_status = f"{C.G}CHAINING{C.E}" if sovereign else f"{C.Y}OBSERVING{C.E}"

    sov_label = f"{C.G}{C.H}ÔÜí SOVEREIGN{C.E}" if sovereign else f"{C.Y}ÔŚç APPROACHING{C.E}"

    print(f"""
{C.DIM}{'Ôöü' * 70}{C.E}
{C.M}   ÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔĽŚ ÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔĽŚÔľłÔľłÔĽŚÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔĽŚ ÔľłÔľłÔĽŚÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔĽŚ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔľłÔľłÔĽöÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔľłÔľłÔĽŚÔľłÔľłÔĽöÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽŁÔľłÔľłÔĽĹÔľłÔľłÔĽöÔĽÉÔĽÉÔľłÔľłÔĽŚÔľłÔľłÔĽĹÔľłÔľłÔĽöÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽŁ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔľłÔľłÔĽĹ   ÔľłÔľłÔĽĹÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔĽŚÔľłÔľłÔĽĹÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔĽöÔĽŁÔľłÔľłÔĽĹÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔĽŚ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔľłÔľłÔĽĹ   ÔľłÔľłÔĽĹÔĽÜÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔľłÔľłÔĽĹÔľłÔľłÔĽĹÔľłÔľłÔĽöÔĽÉÔĽÉÔľłÔľłÔĽŚÔľłÔľłÔĽĹÔĽÜÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔľłÔľłÔĽĹ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽÜÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔĽöÔĽŁÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔĽĹÔľłÔľłÔĽĹÔľłÔľłÔĽĹ  ÔľłÔľłÔĽĹÔľłÔľłÔĽĹÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔĽĹ{C.E}
