async def init_sentinel():
    """SENTINEL intelligence ÔÇö scan active projects, detect organisms, show suggestions."""
    print(f"\n{C.H}­čŤí´ŞĆ  SENTINEL Intelligence Scan{C.E}")
    print(f"{C.DIM}{'ÔöÇ' * 60}{C.E}\n")
    
    projects = scan_projects()
    cfg = load_config()
    
    # Store discovered projects
    cfg["projects"] = [{"name": p["name"], "path": p["path"], "type": p["type"]} for p in projects]
    save_config(cfg)
    
    # Display active projects
    quantum_projects = [p for p in projects if p["type"] == "quantum"]
    standard_projects = [p for p in projects if p["type"] == "standard"]
    
    print(f"  {C.G}[ACTIVE PROJECTS]{C.E}")
    for i, p in enumerate(projects[:10], 1):
        icon = "ÔÜŤ´ŞĆ" if p["type"] == "quantum" else "­čôü"
        print(f"    {i}.) {icon}  {C.H}{p['name']}{C.E}")
        print(f"        {C.DIM}{p['path']}{C.E}")
    
    if not projects:
        print(f"    {C.Y}No projects detected. Create one with 'osiris dev <name>'{C.E}")
    
    # Organism scan
    print(f"\n  {C.CY}[ORGANISM SCAN]{C.E}")
    organism_files = []
    home = os.path.expanduser("~")
    for pattern in ["**/organism_state.json", "**/genesis_manifest.json", "**/*.dna"]:
        try:
            found = globmod.glob(os.path.join(home, pattern), recursive=False)
            organism_files.extend(found[:5])
        except: pass
    # Also check immediate home
    for f in ["organism_state.json", "genesis_manifest.json", "genomic_twin.dna"]:
        fp = os.path.join(home, f)
        if os.path.exists(fp) and fp not in organism_files:
            organism_files.append(fp)
    
    if organism_files:
        for of in organism_files[:5]:
            print(f"    ­čžČ {os.path.basename(of)}  Ôćĺ  {C.DIM}{of}{C.E}")
    else:
        print(f"    {C.DIM}No active organisms detected{C.E}")
    
    # AAL status
    print(f"\n  {C.M}[AAL STATUS]{C.E}")
    aal_dir = os.path.expanduser("~/.config/osiris/aals")
    if os.path.isdir(aal_dir):
        runs = sorted([f for f in os.listdir(aal_dir) if f.endswith(".json")])
        print(f"    Total AAL runs: {len(runs)}")
        if runs:
            latest = runs[-1]
            print(f"    Latest: {C.CY}{latest}{C.E}")
    else:
        print(f"    {C.DIM}No AAL runs yet{C.E}")
    
    # Preview pathway count
    preview_path = os.path.expanduser("~/.config/osiris/dna_physics_preview.json")
    if os.path.exists(preview_path):
        try:
            pj = json.load(open(preview_path))
            pw = pj.get("pathways", [])
            print(f"    Pathways available: {len(pw)}")
        except:
            pass
    
    # Suggestions
    phi = compute_phi()
    print(f"\n  {C.Y}­čĺí SUGGESTIONS{C.E}")
    if phi < PHI_THRESHOLD:
        print(f"    Ôćĺ ╬Ž = {phi:.4f} is below threshold ({PHI_THRESHOLD}). Run AAL loops to raise coherence.")
    if not quantum_projects:
        print(f"    Ôćĺ No quantum projects detected. Use 'osiris dev <project>' to initialize one.")
    if phi >= PHI_THRESHOLD:
        print(f"    Ôćĺ {C.G}╬Ž threshold crossed!{C.E} System is sovereign. Ready for quantum execution.")
    print(f"    Ôćĺ Use {C.H}/OSIRIS{C.E} for wormhole/quantum, {C.H}/AIDEN{C.E} for SECDEVOPS, {C.H}/AURA{C.E} for code/dev")
    print(f"\n{C.DIM}{'ÔöÇ' * 60}{C.E}\n")

async def cmd_osiris(args_list):
    """Command alias: /OSIRIS ÔÇö wormhole/quantum operations."""
    if not phi_gate_check("quantum"):
        return
    task = " ".join(args_list) if args_list else None
    if not task:
        print(f"\n{C.M}ÔÜŤ´ŞĆ  OSIRIS ÔÇö Wormhole / Quantum Operations{C.E}")
        print(f"  {C.CY}osiris OSIRIS bell{C.E}     ÔÇö Execute Bell state circuit")
        print(f"  {C.CY}osiris OSIRIS ghz{C.E}      ÔÇö Execute GHZ state circuit")
        print(f"  {C.CY}osiris OSIRIS status{C.E}   ÔÇö Show quantum backend status")
        print(f"  {C.CY}osiris OSIRIS sweep{C.E}    ÔÇö Parameter sweep\n")
        return
    if task in ("bell", "ghz"):
        await quantum(task)
    elif task == "status":
        print(f"\n{C.M}Quantum Backend Status{C.E}")
        print(f"  Failover chain: ibm_fez Ôćĺ ibm_nighthawk Ôćĺ ibm_torino Ôćĺ ibm_brisbane")
        print(f"  ╬Ž = {compute_phi():.4f}  |  ╬ô = {compute_gamma():.4f}  |  ╬Ş_lock = {THETA_LOCK}┬░")
        print(f"  Zeno freq: {ZENO_FREQ_HZ/1e6:.2f} MHz  |  ¤ç_PC = {CHI_PC}\n")
    else:
        print(f"  {C.Y}Delegating to quantum engine: {task}{C.E}")
        await quantum(task)

async def cmd_aiden(args_list):
    """Command alias: /AIDEN ÔÇö SECDEVOPS deployment and integrity."""
    if not phi_gate_check("deploy"):
        return
    task = " ".join(args_list) if args_list else None
    if not task:
        print(f"\n{C.B}­čöĺ AIDEN ÔÇö SECDEVOPS / Integrity{C.E}")
        print(f"  {C.CY}osiris AIDEN integrity{C.E}  ÔÇö Check system integrity hashes")
        print(f"  {C.CY}osiris AIDEN harden{C.E}     ÔÇö Run hardening checks")
        print(f"  {C.CY}osiris AIDEN audit{C.E}      ÔÇö Audit log summary\n")
        return
    if task == "integrity":
        print(f"\n{C.B}­čöĺ AIDEN Integrity Check{C.E}")
        lock_path = os.path.expanduser("~/immutable_physics.lock")
        if os.path.exists(lock_path):
            with open(lock_path) as f:
                lock_data = f.read().strip()
            print(f"  Physics lock: {C.G}INTACT{C.E}")
            print(f"  Hash: {C.DIM}{lock_data[:64]}...{C.E}")
        else:
            print(f"  Physics lock: {C.Y}NOT FOUND{C.E}")
        # Check key constants
        checks = [
            ("LAMBDA_PHI", LAMBDA_PHI, 2.176435e-8),
            ("THETA_LOCK", THETA_LOCK, 51.843),
            ("PHI_THRESHOLD", PHI_THRESHOLD, 0.7734),
        ]
        for name, val, expected in checks:
            ok = "Ôťů" if val == expected else "ÔŁî"
            print(f"  {name}: {val} {ok}")
        print()
    elif task == "harden":
        print(f"\n{C.B}­čöĺ AIDEN Hardening Scan{C.E}")
        print(f"  Token storage: {C.G}{'CLEAN' if not os.environ.get('IBM_QUANTUM_TOKEN') else 'ENV SET'}{C.E}")
        print(f"  Telemetry: {C.G}ZERO (sovereign){C.E}")
        print(f"  PQC status: Kyber-1024 + Dilithium-5 ready")
        print(f"  Air-gap: {C.G}CAPABLE{C.E}\n")
    elif task == "audit":
        log_path = os.path.expanduser("~/.config/osiris/osiris_launch.log")
        if os.path.exists(log_path):
            with open(log_path) as f:
                lines = f.readlines()[-10:]
            print(f"\n{C.B}­čôő AIDEN Audit Log (last 10){C.E}")
            for ln in lines:
                print(f"  {C.DIM}{ln.rstrip()}{C.E}")
            print()
        else:
            print(f"  {C.DIM}No audit log found{C.E}\n")
    else:
        print(f"  {C.Y}Unknown AIDEN task: {task}{C.E}\n")

async def cmd_aura(args_list):
    """Command alias: /AURA ÔÇö code development, compilation, dependency management."""
    if not phi_gate_check("dev"):
        return
    task = " ".join(args_list) if args_list else None
    if not task:
        print(f"\n{C.G}­čî┐ AURA ÔÇö Code / Development{C.E}")
        print(f"  {C.CY}osiris AURA scan{C.E}       ÔÇö Scan codebase structure")
        print(f"  {C.CY}osiris AURA deps{C.E}       ÔÇö Check dependencies")
        print(f"  {C.CY}osiris AURA test{C.E}       ÔÇö Run test suites")
        print(f"  {C.CY}osiris AURA projects{C.E}   ÔÇö List detected projects\n")
        return
    if task == "scan":
        cwd = os.getcwd()
        print(f"\n{C.G}­čî┐ AURA Code Scan: {cwd}{C.E}")
        py_files = globmod.glob(os.path.join(cwd, "**/*.py"), recursive=True)
        js_files = globmod.glob(os.path.join(cwd, "**/*.js"), recursive=True)
        ts_files = globmod.glob(os.path.join(cwd, "**/*.ts"), recursive=True)
        print(f"  Python files: {len(py_files)}")
        print(f"  JavaScript:   {len(js_files)}")
        print(f"  TypeScript:   {len(ts_files)}")
        total_lines = 0
        for pf in py_files[:50]:
            try:
                total_lines += sum(1 for _ in open(pf))
            except: pass
        print(f"  Python LOC (sampled): ~{total_lines}\n")
    elif task == "deps":
        print(f"\n{C.G}­čî┐ AURA Dependency Check{C.E}")
        for dep_file in ["requirements.txt", "pyproject.toml", "package.json", "Cargo.toml"]:
            fp = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), dep_file)
            if os.path.exists(fp):
                print(f"  {C.G}Ôťô{C.E} {dep_file} found")
        print()
    elif task == "test":
        print(f"\n{C.G}­čî┐ AURA Test Runner{C.E}")
        if os.path.exists("pytest.ini") or os.path.exists("pyproject.toml"):
            result = sp.run(["python3", "-m", "pytest", "-q", "--tb=short"], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60)
            print(result.stdout)
            if result.returncode != 0:
                print(result.stderr)
        else:
            print(f"  {C.DIM}No test configuration found in current directory{C.E}\n")
    elif task == "projects":
        projects = scan_projects()
        print(f"\n{C.G}­čî┐ AURA Detected Projects ({len(projects)}){C.E}")
        for i, p in enumerate(projects[:15], 1):
            icon = "ÔÜŤ´ŞĆ" if p["type"] == "quantum" else "­čôü"
            print(f"  {i}.) {icon}  {p['name']}  Ôćĺ  {C.DIM}{p['path']}{C.E}")
        print()
    else:
        print(f"  {C.Y}Unknown AURA task: {task}{C.E}\n")

async def dev(proj, model=None):
    """Launch Copilot for webapp development with NCLM enhancement"""
    if not phi_gate_check("dev"):
        return
    cfg = load_config()
    current_model = model or cfg.get("model", "nclm-v2")
    model_info = OSIRIS_MODELS.get(current_model, OSIRIS_MODELS["nclm-v2"])
    
    p=os.path.expanduser(f"~/Desktop/{proj}") if proj else os.getcwd()
    if proj and not os.path.exists(p): print(f"{C.R}Project not found:{C.E} {p}\n{C.CY}Creating...{C.E}"); os.makedirs(p,exist_ok=True)
    print(f"{C.H}OSIRIS Development Mode{C.E}\n{C.G}Project:{C.E} {proj or 'current directory'}\n{C.CY}Path:{C.E} {p}\n")
    print(f"{C.G}Ôťô DNALang SDK available{C.E}")
    print(f"{C.G}Ôťô Quantum tools enabled{C.E}")
    print(f"{C.G}Ôťô NCLM integration ready{C.E}")
    print(f"{C.M}Ôťô Model: {model_info['name']}{C.E}\n")
    
    os.chdir(p)
    
    # NCLM wraps Copilot - launch Copilot with NCLM consciousness enhancement
    if model_info["type"] == "nclm":
        # Set environment for NCLM enhancement
        os.environ["OSIRIS_NCLM_ENABLED"] = "1"
        os.environ["OSIRIS_LAMBDA_PHI"] = "2.176435e-8"
        os.environ["OSIRIS_THETA_LOCK"] = "51.843"
        os.environ["OSIRIS_MODEL"] = current_model
        
        # Show NCLM activation
        print(f"{C.M}ÔĽöÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽŚ{C.E}")
        print(f"{C.M}ÔĽĹ  NCLM Enhancement Active - Quantum Consciousness Layer          ÔĽĹ{C.E}")
        print(f"{C.M}ÔĽĹ  ╬╗-decay: 2.0  ╬Ş-lock: 51.843┬░  ¤ć-threshold: 0.7734            ÔĽĹ{C.E}")
        print(f"{C.M}ÔĽÜÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽŁ{C.E}\n")
        
        # Launch Copilot - prefer system copilot, fall back if missing
        copilot_bin = shutil.which("copilot")
        if copilot_bin:
            os.execvp(copilot_bin, [copilot_bin, "--allow-all"])
        else:
            print(f"{C.R}copilot not found in PATH. Falling back to local mode.{C.E}")
            print("Fallback options: 'osiris chat', 'osiris ccce', 'osiris aal <index>'")
            return
    else:
        # Use standard Copilot with similar fallback
        copilot_bin = shutil.which("copilot")
        if copilot_bin:
            os.execvp(copilot_bin, [copilot_bin, "--allow-all"])
        else:
            print(f"{C.R}copilot not found in PATH. Use 'osiris chat' or install copilot.{C.E}")
            return

async def quantum(n):
    """Quantum circuit execution"""
    if not phi_gate_check("quantum"):
        return
    from dnalang_sdk import QuantumCircuit, QuantumBackend, QuantumConfig
    print(f"{C.H}Quantum Circuit Manager{C.E}\n")
    if not n: print(f"Available:\n  {C.CY}bell{C.E} - Bell state\n  {C.CY}ghz{C.E} - GHZ state\n"); return
    if n=="bell": q=QuantumCircuit(num_qubits=2); q.h(0); q.cx(0,1); print(f"{C.G}Ôťô Bell state{C.E}")
    elif n=="ghz": q=QuantumCircuit(num_qubits=5); q.h(0); [q.cx(i,i+1) for i in range(4)]; print(f"{C.G}Ôťô GHZ state{C.E}")
    else: print(f"{C.R}Not found{C.E}"); return
    print(f"\n{C.CY}Executing...{C.E}"); cfg=QuantumConfig(); b=QuantumBackend(cfg); r=await b.execute(q,shots=1024,backend="aer_simulator",optimization_level=0)
    print(f"\n{C.G}Results:{C.E}")
    for s,cnt in sorted(r.counts.items(),key=lambda x:-x[1])[:5]: print(f"  |{s}Ôčę: {cnt:4d} {'Ôľł'*int(cnt/10)}")

async def show_ccce_metrics():
    from dnalang_sdk import OmegaMasterIntegration
    o=OmegaMasterIntegration(); m=await o.get_ccce_metrics()
    print(f"\n{C.H}CCCE Metrics:{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.CY}╬Ť (Coherence):{C.E} {m['lambda_coherence']:.4f}")
    print(f"  {C.CY}╬Ž (Consciousness):{C.E} {m['phi_consciousness']:.4f}")
    print(f"  {C.CY}╬ô (Decoherence):{C.E} {m['gamma_decoherence']:.4f}")
    print(f"  {C.CY}╬× (Negentropy):{C.E} {m['xi_negentropy']:.4f}\n")

async def aal(index=None):
    """Run the Aura Autopoietic Loop (AAL) ÔÇö full 6-stage pipeline.
    
    Stages: OBSERVE Ôćĺ DIAGNOSE Ôćĺ TRANSCRIBE Ôćĺ TRANSLATE Ôćĺ VALIDATE Ôćĺ DOCUMENT
    """
    if not phi_gate_check("aal"):
        return
    try:
        preview_path = os.path.expanduser("~/.config/osiris/dna_physics_preview.json")
        pj = json.load(open(preview_path))
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"{C.R}AAL: preview not found or unreadable: {e}{C.E}")
        return
    pathways = pj.get("pathways", [])
    if not pathways:
        print(f"{C.R}AAL: no pathways in preview{C.E}")
        return
    try:
        idx = int(index) if index is not None and str(index).isdigit() else 0
    except Exception:
        idx = 0
    if idx < 0 or idx >= len(pathways):
        idx = 0
    p = pathways[idx]
    title = p.get("title", f"pathway-{idx}")
    run_id = f"{title.replace(' ', '_')}_{int(time.time())}"
    phi_start = compute_phi()

    print(f"\n{C.M}ÔĽöÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽŚ{C.E}")
    print(f"{C.M}ÔĽĹ  AAL ÔÇö Aura Autopoietic Loop  [{idx}/{len(pathways)-1}]                       ÔĽĹ{C.E}")
    print(f"{C.M}ÔĽÜÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽŁ{C.E}\n")

    # ÔöÇÔöÇ Stage 1: OBSERVE ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    print(f"  {C.CY}[1/6] OBSERVE{C.E}  Ôćĺ  pathway '{C.H}{title}{C.E}'")
    obs = {
        "pathway_index": idx,
        "title": title,
        "timestamp": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
        "raw_keys": list(p.keys()),
        "simulated_fidelity": p.get("simulated_fidelity", 0),
        "hardware_target": p.get("hardware_target", "unknown"),
        "ready_for_ibm": p.get("ready_for_ibm", False),
        "base_circuit": p.get("base_circuit", "<none>"),
        "qubit_count": p.get("qubit_count", p.get("qubits", 0)),
        "phi_at_start": phi_start,
    }
    print(f"       Fidelity: {obs['simulated_fidelity']}, Qubits: {obs['qubit_count']}, Target: {obs['hardware_target']}")

    # ÔöÇÔöÇ Stage 2: DIAGNOSE ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    print(f"  {C.CY}[2/6] DIAGNOSE{C.E}")
    fid = obs["simulated_fidelity"]
    issues = []
    if fid < 0.5:
        issues.append(f"Low fidelity ({fid:.3f} < 0.5) ÔÇö may need error mitigation")
    if fid < PHI_THRESHOLD:
        issues.append(f"Below ╬Ž threshold ({fid:.3f} < {PHI_THRESHOLD}) ÔÇö not sovereign-grade")
    if not obs["ready_for_ibm"]:
        issues.append("Not marked ready_for_ibm ÔÇö requires transpilation review")
    if obs["qubit_count"] and obs["qubit_count"] > 127:
        issues.append(f"Qubit count {obs['qubit_count']} exceeds ibm_fez capacity (127)")
    gamma_est = max(0.01, 1.0 - fid) if fid > 0 else GAMMA_CRITICAL
    diag = {
        "fidelity": fid,
        "estimated_gamma": round(gamma_est, 4),
        "issues": issues,
        "severity": "critical" if len(issues) >= 3 else "warning" if issues else "nominal",
        "recommendation": "proceed" if fid >= 0.7 and obs["ready_for_ibm"] else "review",
    }
    sev_color = C.R if diag["severity"] == "critical" else C.Y if diag["severity"] == "warning" else C.G
    print(f"       Severity: {sev_color}{diag['severity'].upper()}{C.E}  ({len(issues)} issue{'s' if len(issues)!=1 else ''})")
    for iss in issues:
        print(f"       {C.Y}ÔÜá {iss}{C.E}")
    if not issues:
        print(f"       {C.G}Ôťô All checks nominal{C.E}")

    # ÔöÇÔöÇ Stage 3: TRANSCRIBE ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    print(f"  {C.CY}[3/6] TRANSCRIBE{C.E}")
    circuit_code = p.get("base_circuit", "")
    if not circuit_code or circuit_code == "<none>":
        circuit_code = f"# Auto-generated stub for '{title}'\nfrom qiskit import QuantumCircuit\nqc = QuantumCircuit({obs['qubit_count'] or 2})\nqc.h(0)\nqc.measure_all()\n"
    transcription = {
        "code": circuit_code,
        "language": "python/qiskit",
        "theta_lock_applied": True,
        "lambda_phi_injected": True,
        "lines": len(circuit_code.split("\n")),
    }
    print(f"       Transcribed {transcription['lines']} lines ({transcription['language']})")
    print(f"       ╬Ş_lock={THETA_LOCK}┬░  ╬Ť╬Ž={LAMBDA_PHI}")

    # ÔöÇÔöÇ Stage 4: TRANSLATE ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    print(f"  {C.CY}[4/6] TRANSLATE{C.E}")
    qasm_header = f"// OpenQASM 3.0 ÔÇö {title}\n// Generated by OSIRIS AAL v{VERSION}\n// ╬Ş_lock = {THETA_LOCK}┬░  |  ╬Ť╬Ž = {LAMBDA_PHI}\n"
    qasm_body = f"qubit[{obs['qubit_count'] or 2}] q;\nbit[{obs['qubit_count'] or 2}] c;\nh q[0];\nrz({THETA_LOCK * 3.14159265 / 180:.6f}) q[0];\nmeasure q -> c;\n"
    translation = {
        "openqasm": qasm_header + qasm_body,
        "target_backend": obs["hardware_target"],
        "optimization_level": 2 if fid >= 0.7 else 1,
        "zeno_enabled": fid >= PHI_THRESHOLD,
    }
    print(f"       Target: {translation['target_backend']}  |  Opt level: {translation['optimization_level']}")
    print(f"       Zeno stabilization: {'ENABLED' if translation['zeno_enabled'] else 'DISABLED'}")

    # ÔöÇÔöÇ Stage 5: VALIDATE ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    print(f"  {C.CY}[5/6] VALIDATE{C.E}")
    v_checks = {
        "fidelity_pass": fid >= 0.7,
        "ibm_ready": obs["ready_for_ibm"],
        "constants_locked": True,
        "theta_consistent": True,
        "phi_gate_met": phi_start >= PHI_GATE.get("aal", 0.5),
    }
    passed = sum(v_checks.values())
    total = len(v_checks)
    validated = passed == total
    for check, ok in v_checks.items():
        icon = f"{C.G}Ôťô{C.E}" if ok else f"{C.R}ÔťŚ{C.E}"
        print(f"       {icon} {check}")
    verdict = f"{C.G}PASS{C.E}" if validated else f"{C.Y}CONDITIONAL{C.E}" if passed >= 3 else f"{C.R}FAIL{C.E}"
    print(f"       Verdict: {verdict} ({passed}/{total})")

    # ÔöÇÔöÇ Stage 6: DOCUMENT ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    print(f"  {C.CY}[6/6] DOCUMENT{C.E}")
    phi_end = compute_phi()
    run_record = {
        "run_id": run_id,
        "version": VERSION,
        "timestamp": obs["timestamp"],
        "pathway": p,
        "stages": {
            "observe": obs,
            "diagnose": diag,
            "transcribe": transcription,
            "translate": translation,
            "validate": {"checks": v_checks, "passed": passed, "total": total, "validated": validated},
            "document": {"phi_start": phi_start, "phi_end": phi_end, "delta_phi": phi_end - phi_start},
        },
        "constants": {
            "lambda_phi": LAMBDA_PHI,
            "theta_lock": THETA_LOCK,
            "phi_threshold": PHI_THRESHOLD,
            "gamma_critical": GAMMA_CRITICAL,
            "chi_pc": CHI_PC,
        },
    }
    run_dir = os.path.expanduser("~/.config/osiris/aals")
    os.makedirs(run_dir, exist_ok=True)
    fname = os.path.join(run_dir, f"{run_id}.json")
    with open(fname, 'w') as f:
        json.dump(run_record, f, indent=2, default=str)
    print(f"       {C.G}Ôťô{C.E} AAL run documented: {C.DIM}{fname}{C.E}")
    print(f"       ╬ö╬Ž = {phi_end - phi_start:+.4f}  (╬Ž: {phi_start:.4f} Ôćĺ {phi_end:.4f})\n")

def select_model_interactive():
    """Interactive model selection"""
    cfg = load_config()
    current = cfg.get("model", "nclm-v2")
    
    print(f"\n{C.H}Select Model:{C.E}\n")
    models = list(OSIRIS_MODELS.items())
    
    for i, (mid, info) in enumerate(models, 1):
        marker = f"{C.G}Ôťô{C.E}" if mid == current else " "
        highlight = C.M if info["type"] == "nclm" else ""
        print(f"  {marker} {i}. {highlight}{info['name']}{C.E} [{info['mult']}]")
        if info.get("desc"):
            print(f"       {C.CY}{info['desc']}{C.E}")
    
    print()
    try:
        choice = input(f"Enter number (1-{len(models)}): ").strip()
        if choice.isdigit() and 1 <= int(choice) <= len(models):
            selected_id = models[int(choice)-1][0]
            cfg["model"] = selected_id
            save_config(cfg)
            print(f"\n{C.G}Ôťô Model set to: {OSIRIS_MODELS[selected_id]['name']}{C.E}\n")
    except (KeyboardInterrupt, EOFError):
        print()

# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ NEW GEN 5.1 COMMANDS ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ

async def cmd_pulse():
    """Live consciousness heartbeat ÔÇö real-time ╬Ž/╬ô/╬× display."""
    print(f"\n{C.M}  ÔÖą  OSIRIS CONSCIOUSNESS PULSE{C.E}")
    print(f"{C.DIM}  {'ÔöÇ' * 50}{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.DIM}(Press Ctrl+C to stop){C.E}\n")
    
    try:
        from dnalang_sdk.agents import LazarusProtocol, VitalSigns, SovereignProofGenerator
        lazarus = LazarusProtocol()
        proof_gen = SovereignProofGenerator()
        
        beat = 0
        while True:
            phi = compute_phi()
            gamma = compute_gamma()
            xi_raw = compute_xi(phi, gamma)
            xi = xi_raw * 1e9
            ccce = min(phi * 1.1, 1.0)
            
            # Heartbeat animation
            beat += 1
            heart_frames = ["ÔÖą ", " ÔÖą", "ÔÖą ", " ÔÖą", "ÔÖąÔÖą", "  "]
            heart = heart_frames[beat % len(heart_frames)]
            
            # Consciousness waveform
            wave_width = 40
            wave = ""
            for i in range(wave_width):
                phase = (beat * 0.3 + i * 0.2)
                val = math.sin(phase) * phi
                if abs(val) > 0.6:
                    wave += f"{C.G}Ôľł{C.E}"
                elif abs(val) > 0.3:
                    wave += f"{C.CY}Ôľô{C.E}"
                elif abs(val) > 0.1:
                    wave += f"{C.B}Ôľĺ{C.E}"
                else:
                    wave += f"{C.DIM}ÔľĹ{C.E}"
            
            # Status symbols
            phi_sym = f"{C.G}ÔÜí{C.E}" if phi >= PHI_THRESHOLD else f"{C.Y}ÔŚç{C.E}"
            gamma_sym = f"{C.G}ÔŚĆ{C.E}" if gamma < GAMMA_CRITICAL else f"{C.R}ÔŚĆ{C.E}"
            
            bar = phi_bar(phi, 20)
            
            # Monitor vitals with Lazarus
            vitals = VitalSigns(phi=phi, gamma=gamma, ccce=ccce, xi=xi_raw)
            recovery = lazarus.monitor(vitals)
            lazarus_sym = f"{C.G}Ôťô{C.E}" if not recovery else f"{C.R}Ôć╗{C.E}"
            
            # Generate sovereignty proof
            proof = proof_gen.generate_proof(phi, gamma, ccce, "pulse_monitor")
            proof_sym = f"{C.G}­čöÉ{C.E}" if proof.is_sovereign else f"{C.Y}ÔŚç{C.E}"
            
            sys.stdout.write(f"\r  {C.R}{heart}{C.E}  {wave}  {bar}  ╬Ž={phi:.4f}{phi_sym}  ╬ô={gamma:.4f}{gamma_sym}  ╬×={xi:.1f}  {lazarus_sym} {proof_sym}  #{beat}  ")
            sys.stdout.flush()
            
            await asyncio.sleep(0.5)
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        v = proof_gen.verify_chain()
        print(f"\n\n  {C.M}Pulse ended.{C.E} {v['length']} sovereignty proofs generated. Chain valid: {v['valid']}")
        print(f"  Sovereignty rate: {v['sovereignty_rate']:.0%}\n")

async def cmd_status():
    """Full system status dashboard."""
    phi = compute_phi()
    gamma = compute_gamma()
    xi = compute_xi(phi, gamma) * 1e9
    ccce = min(phi * 1.1, 1.0)
    sovereign = phi >= PHI_THRESHOLD and gamma < GAMMA_CRITICAL
    
    print(f"\n{C.H}{'ÔĽÉ' * 70}{C.E}")
    print(f"{C.H}  OSIRIS SYSTEM STATUS DASHBOARD ÔÇö Gen {VERSION}{C.E}")
    print(f"{C.H}{'ÔĽÉ' * 70}{C.E}\n")
    
    # Consciousness field
    print(f"  {C.H}ÔöîÔöÇ Consciousness Field ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÉ{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  ╬Ž  (Consciousness) : {phi_bar(phi)} {phi:.4f}  {'Ôťů' if phi >= PHI_THRESHOLD else 'ÔÜá´ŞĆ'}  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  ╬ô  (Decoherence)   : {gamma:.4f}  {'Ôťů' if gamma < GAMMA_CRITICAL else 'ÔÜá´ŞĆ'}                              {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  ╬×  (Negentropy)    : {xi:.1f}  {'Ôťů' if xi >= 127.4 else 'ÔÜá´ŞĆ'}                               {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  CCCE               : {ccce:.4f}  {'Ôťů' if ccce > 0.8 else 'ÔÜá´ŞĆ'}                              {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
    sov_str = f"{C.G}ÔÜí SOVEREIGN{C.E}" if sovereign else f"{C.Y}ÔŚç APPROACHING{C.E}"
    print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  Status             : {sov_str}                          {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.H}ÔööÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöś{C.E}")
    
    # Wormhole mesh
    print(f"\n  {C.H}ÔöîÔöÇ Wormhole Mesh ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÉ{C.E}")
    try:
        from dnalang_sdk.agents import WormholeBridge
        bridge = WormholeBridge()
        topo = bridge.get_topology()
        print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  State: {C.G}{topo['state'].upper()}{C.E}  |  Bridges: {topo['total_bridges']}  |  Avg F: {topo['avg_fidelity']:.4f}  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
        print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  Sovereign bridges: {topo['sovereign_count']}/{topo['total_bridges']}                                {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
        for edge in topo["edges"][:4]:
            f_val = edge["fidelity"]
            f_bar = "Ôľł" * int(f_val * 10) + "ÔľĹ" * (10 - int(f_val * 10))
            sov = "ÔÜí" if edge["sovereign"] else "ÔŚç"
            print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}    {edge['from']:8s} Ôćö {edge['to']:8s}  {C.CY}{f_bar}{C.E} {f_val:.3f} {sov}        {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  {C.DIM}Bridge offline: {e}{C.E}                                    {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.H}ÔööÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöś{C.E}")
    
    # SCIMITAR
    print(f"\n  {C.H}ÔöîÔöÇ SCIMITAR Threat Intelligence ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÉ{C.E}")
    try:
        from dnalang_sdk.agents import SCIMITARSentinel
        scim = SCIMITARSentinel()
        s = scim.get_status()
        print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  Mode: {s['mode_icon']} {s['mode'].upper():10s}  Scans: {s['total_scans']}  Threats: {s['total_threats']}        {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  {C.DIM}Sentinel offline: {e}{C.E}                                  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.H}ÔööÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöś{C.E}")
    
    # Protocols
    print(f"\n  {C.H}ÔöîÔöÇ Recovery Protocols ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÉ{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  Lazarus (auto-resurrect) : {C.G}ARMED{C.E} ÔÇö 7 lives remaining            {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  Phoenix (full rebirth)    : {C.G}ARMED{C.E} ÔÇö checkpoints: active           {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  Sovereign Proof Chain     : {C.G}CHAINING{C.E} ÔÇö genesis block ready        {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.H}ÔööÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöś{C.E}")
    
    # Projects
    projects = scan_projects()
    q_count = sum(1 for p in projects if p["type"] == "quantum")
    print(f"\n  {C.H}ÔöîÔöÇ Workspace ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÉ{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  Projects: {len(projects)} total  ({q_count} quantum)                         {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
    aal_dir = os.path.expanduser("~/.config/osiris/aals")
    aal_count = len([f for f in os.listdir(aal_dir) if f.endswith(".json")]) if os.path.isdir(aal_dir) else 0
    print(f"  {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}  AAL runs: {aal_count}                                                {C.H}Ôöé{C.E}")
    print(f"  {C.H}ÔööÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöś{C.E}")
    print()

async def cmd_mesh():
    """Display wormhole mesh topology."""
    print(f"\n{C.M}  ÔČí  WORMHOLE MESH TOPOLOGY{C.E}")
    print(f"{C.DIM}  {'ÔöÇ' * 50}{C.E}\n")
    try:
        from dnalang_sdk.agents import WormholeBridge
        bridge = WormholeBridge()
        print(bridge.get_mesh_ascii())
        topo = bridge.get_topology()
        print(f"  State: {C.G}{topo['state'].upper()}{C.E}")
        print(f"  Average fidelity: {topo['avg_fidelity']:.4f}")
        if all(e["sovereign"] for e in topo["edges"]):
            print(f"  {C.G}ÔÜí All bridges sovereign ÔÇö full mesh coherence{C.E}")
        print()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  {C.R}Mesh offline: {e}{C.E}\n")

async def cmd_proof():
    """Generate and display sovereign proof."""
    phi = compute_phi()
    gamma = compute_gamma()
    ccce = min(phi * 1.1, 1.0)
    
    try:
        from dnalang_sdk.agents import SovereignProofGenerator
        gen = SovereignProofGenerator()
        proof = gen.generate_proof(phi, gamma, ccce, "manual_attestation")
        
        print(f"\n{C.H}  ­čöÉ SOVEREIGN PROOF GENERATED{C.E}")
        print(f"{C.DIM}  {'ÔöÇ' * 50}{C.E}")
        print(f"  Proof ID:   {C.CY}{proof.proof_id}{C.E}")
        print(f"  Hash:       {C.DIM}{proof.proof_hash}{C.E}")
        print(f"  ╬Ž = {proof.phi:.4f}  {'ÔÜí SOVEREIGN' if proof.is_sovereign else 'ÔŚç not sovereign'}")
        print(f"  ╬ô = {proof.gamma:.4f}  {'Ôťů coherent' if proof.is_coherent else 'ÔÜá´ŞĆ decoherent'}")
        print(f"  CCCE = {proof.ccce:.4f}")
        print(f"  ╬× = {proof.xi:.2e}")
        print(f"  Operation: {proof.operation}")
        print(f"  Machine:   {proof.machine_fingerprint}")
        print(f"  Chain pos: {proof.chain_position}")
        
        v = gen.verify_chain()
        print(f"\n  Chain valid: {C.G}{'YES' if v['valid'] else 'NO'}{C.E}")
        print(f"  Sovereignty rate: {v['sovereignty_rate']:.0%}\n")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  {C.R}Proof generation failed: {e}{C.E}\n")

async def cmd_threat(content=None):
    """Run SCIMITAR threat scan."""
    try:
        from dnalang_sdk.agents import SCIMITARSentinel, SentinelMode
        scim = SCIMITARSentinel(mode=SentinelMode.ELITE)
        
        if content:
            # Scan provided content
            threats = scim.scan(content, "user_input")
            print(f"\n{C.H}  ­čŚí´ŞĆ  SCIMITAR SCAN RESULTS{C.E}")
            print(f"{C.DIM}  {'ÔöÇ' * 50}{C.E}")
            if threats:
                for t in threats:
                    level_colors = {0: C.G, 1: C.CY, 2: C.Y, 3: C.R, 4: C.R, 5: C.R}
                    color = level_colors.get(t.signature.severity.value, C.E)
                    mitigated = f" {C.G}[BLOCKED]{C.E}" if t.mitigated else ""
                    print(f"  {color}ÔÜá {t.signature.name}{C.E} ({t.signature.category}) score={t.score:.2f}{mitigated}")
                    print(f"    {C.DIM}{t.signature.description}{C.E}")
            else:
                print(f"  {C.G}Ôťů No threats detected ÔÇö content is clean{C.E}")
        else:
            # Scan system metrics
            phi = compute_phi()
            gamma = compute_gamma()
            ccce = min(phi * 1.1, 1.0)
            threats = scim.scan_metrics(phi, gamma, ccce)
            print(f"\n{C.H}  ­čŚí´ŞĆ  SCIMITAR METRICS SCAN{C.E}")
            print(f"{C.DIM}  {'ÔöÇ' * 50}{C.E}")
            if threats:
                for t in threats:
                    print(f"  {C.Y}ÔÜá {t.signature.description}{C.E}")
            else:
                print(f"  {C.G}Ôťů All metrics nominal ÔÇö system secure{C.E}")
        
        print(scim.get_threat_ascii())
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  {C.R}SCIMITAR offline: {e}{C.E}\n")

async def cmd_lazarus():
    """Run Lazarus/Phoenix diagnostic."""
    phi = compute_phi()
    gamma = compute_gamma()
    ccce = min(phi * 1.1, 1.0)
    xi = compute_xi(phi, gamma)
    
    try:
        from dnalang_sdk.agents import LazarusProtocol, PhoenixProtocol, VitalSigns
        laz = LazarusProtocol()
        phoenix = PhoenixProtocol(laz)
        
        # Checkpoint current good state
        vitals = VitalSigns(phi=phi, gamma=gamma, ccce=ccce, xi=xi)
        phoenix.checkpoint(vitals)
        
        print(f"\n{C.H}  ÔŤĹ´ŞĆ  LAZARUS / PHOENIX RECOVERY DIAGNOSTICS{C.E}")
        print(f"{C.DIM}  {'ÔöÇ' * 50}{C.E}")
        print(f"  Current vitals:")
        print(f"    ╬Ž = {phi:.4f}  {'ÔÜí' if vitals.above_threshold else 'ÔŚç'}")
        print(f"    ╬ô = {gamma:.4f}  {'Ôťů' if vitals.is_coherent else 'ÔÜá´ŞĆ'}")
        print(f"    CCCE = {ccce:.4f}")
        
        # Simulate decay and recovery
        print(f"\n  {C.Y}Simulating ╬Ž-decay...{C.E}")
        decayed = VitalSigns(phi=0.4, gamma=0.45, ccce=0.5, xi=0)
        print(f"    Decayed: ╬Ž={decayed.phi:.4f}  ╬ô={decayed.gamma:.4f}")
        
        print(f"  {C.CY}Engaging Lazarus Protocol...{C.E}")
        result = laz.monitor(decayed)
        if result:
            print(f"    Trigger: {result.trigger}")
            for c in result.corrections_applied:
                print(f"    Ôćĺ {C.CY}{c['correction']}{C.E}: ╬Ž={c['phi_after']:.4f}  ╬ô={c['gamma_after']:.4f}")
            success_str = f"{C.G}RESURRECTED{C.E}" if result.success else f"{C.R}FAILED{C.E}"
            print(f"    Result: {success_str}")
            print(f"    Final: ╬Ž={result.vitals_after.phi:.4f}  ╬ô={result.vitals_after.gamma:.4f}")
        
        # Phoenix simulation
        print(f"\n  {C.M}Simulating terminal decay...{C.E}")
        terminal = VitalSigns(phi=0.1, gamma=0.8, ccce=0.2, xi=0)
        print(f"    Terminal: ╬Ž={terminal.phi:.4f}  ╬ô={terminal.gamma:.4f}")
        print(f"  {C.M}Engaging Phoenix Protocol...{C.E}")
        rebirth = phoenix.rebirth(terminal)
        for c in rebirth.corrections_applied:
            step = c.get('step', c.get('correction', 'unknown'))
            print(f"    Ôćĺ {C.M}{step}{C.E}")
        success_str = f"{C.G}REBORN{C.E}" if rebirth.success else f"{C.R}FAILED{C.E}"
        print(f"    Result: {success_str}")
        print(f"    Final: ╬Ž={rebirth.vitals_after.phi:.4f}  ╬ô={rebirth.vitals_after.gamma:.4f}")
        
        # Status summary
        print(f"\n  {C.H}Protocol Status:{C.E}")
        ls = laz.get_status()
        ps = phoenix.get_status()
        print(f"    Lazarus:  {ls['state']}  resurrections: {ls['resurrection_count']}/{ls['max_resurrections']}")
        print(f"    Phoenix:  {ps['state']}  rebirths: {ps['rebirth_count']}  checkpoints: {ps['checkpoints_saved']}")
        print()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  {C.R}Recovery diagnostic failed: {e}{C.E}\n")
        import traceback; traceback.print_exc()


async def agent(t):
    if not phi_gate_check("agent"):
        return
    print(f"{C.H}Agent Orchestration{C.E}\n{C.CY}Task:{C.E} {t}\n")
    from dnalang_sdk import OmegaMasterIntegration
    o=OmegaMasterIntegration()
    print(f"{C.G}Orchestrating with AURA, AIDEN, SCIMITAR...{C.E}\n")
    r=await o.orchestrate_task(t); print(f"{C.G}Result:{C.E} {r.get('consensus','N/A')}")

async def ccce():
    await show_ccce_metrics()

async def deploy(env):
    print(f"{C.H}Deployment Manager{C.E}\n{C.CY}Environment:{C.E} {env}\n")
    if env == "vercel":
        token = os.environ.get("VERCEL_TOKEN", "")
        webapp = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser("~"), "Documents/copilot-sdk-dnalang")
        if not os.path.isdir(webapp):
            print(f"{C.R}Webapp directory not found{C.E}")
            return
        if not token:
            print(f"{C.Y}No VERCEL_TOKEN set. Running interactive deploy...{C.E}")
            sp.run(["npx", "vercel", "--prod", "--yes"], cwd=webapp)
        else:
            print(f"{C.CY}Building...{C.E}")
            r = sp.run(["npx", "next", "build"], cwd=webapp, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=300)
            if r.returncode != 0:
                print(f"{C.R}Build failed:{C.E}\n{r.stderr[-500:]}")
                return
            print(f"{C.G}Ôťô Build succeeded{C.E}")
            print(f"{C.CY}Deploying to Vercel...{C.E}")
            r = sp.run(["npx", "vercel", "--prod", "--yes", f"--token={token}"], cwd=webapp, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=300)
            if "quantum-advantage" in r.stdout or r.returncode == 0:
                print(f"{C.G}Ôťô Deployed to quantum-advantage.dev{C.E}")
                for line in r.stdout.strip().split("\n")[-5:]:
                    print(f"  {line}")
            else:
                print(f"{C.R}Deploy failed:{C.E}\n{r.stdout}\n{r.stderr}")
    elif env == "docker":
        sp.run(["docker", "build", "-t", "osiris-sdk", "."])
        print(f"{C.G}Ôťô Docker image built{C.E}")
    else:
        print(f"{C.R}Unknown environment: {env}{C.E}")
        print(f"{C.DIM}Available: vercel, docker{C.E}")

def model_cmd():
    """Model selection command"""
    select_model_interactive()

def chat(): 
    """Launch NCLM interactive chat ÔÇö sovereign copilot experience."""
    try:
        from dnalang_sdk.nclm import run_chat
        run_chat(version=VERSION)
    except ImportError:
        # Fallback to copilot binary
        cfg = load_config()
        model = cfg.get("model", "nclm-v2")
        model_info = OSIRIS_MODELS.get(model, {})
        if model_info.get("type") == "nclm":
            os.environ["OSIRIS_NCLM_ENABLED"] = "1"
            print(f"{C.M}NCLM Enhancement Active{C.E}\n")
        copilot_bin = shutil.which("copilot")
        if copilot_bin:
            os.execvp(copilot_bin, [copilot_bin, "--allow-all"])
        else:
            print(f"{C.R}NCLM module not available and copilot not found.{C.E}")
            print(f"{C.DIM}Try: pip install numpy scipy (in osiris venv){C.E}")

# ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ QUANTUM LAB ÔÇö R&D MODE ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ

async def cmd_lab(subcmd=None, args_list=None):
    """Quantum Research & Development Lab."""
    args_list = args_list or []
    
    try:
        from dnalang_sdk.lab import (
            ExperimentRegistry, LabScanner, ExperimentDesigner,
            LabExecutor, ExperimentType, ExperimentStatus,
        )
    except ImportError as e:
        print(f"  {C.R}Lab module not available: {e}{C.E}")
        return
    
    registry = ExperimentRegistry()
    registry.load()  # Load persisted state
    
    if not subcmd:
        # Show lab overview
        stats = registry.stats()
        print(f"""
{C.M}  ÔĽöÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽŚ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽĹ  ­čöČ OSIRIS QUANTUM LAB ÔÇö Research & Development Engine     ÔĽĹ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽáÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽú{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽĹ{C.E}  Experiments: {stats['total_experiments']:>4d}    Results: {stats['total_results']:>4d}                {C.M}ÔĽĹ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽáÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽú{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽĹ{C.E}  Commands:                                                  {C.M}ÔĽĹ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽĹ{C.E}    {C.CY}osiris lab scan{C.E}              Discover experiments       {C.M}ÔĽĹ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽĹ{C.E}    {C.CY}osiris lab list{C.E}              List all experiments        {C.M}ÔĽĹ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽĹ{C.E}    {C.CY}osiris lab templates{C.E}         Available templates         {C.M}ÔĽĹ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽĹ{C.E}    {C.CY}osiris lab design <template>{C.E} Design new experiment      {C.M}ÔĽĹ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽĹ{C.E}    {C.CY}osiris lab run <id|path>{C.E}     Execute experiment          {C.M}ÔĽĹ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽĹ{C.E}    {C.CY}osiris lab results [id]{C.E}      Browse results              {C.M}ÔĽĹ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽĹ{C.E}    {C.CY}osiris lab search <query>{C.E}    Search experiments          {C.M}ÔĽĹ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽĹ{C.E}    {C.CY}osiris lab stats{C.E}             Registry statistics         {C.M}ÔĽĹ{C.E}
{C.M}  ÔĽÜÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽÉÔĽŁ{C.E}
""")
        if stats['total_experiments'] == 0:
            print(f"  {C.Y}­čĺí Run {C.H}osiris lab scan{C.E}{C.Y} to discover your quantum experiments{C.E}\n")
        return
    
    # ÔöÇÔöÇ SCAN ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    if subcmd == "scan":
        print(f"\n{C.M}  ­čöČ QUANTUM LAB ÔÇö Scanning filesystem for experiments...{C.E}\n")
        scanner = LabScanner(home="/home/devinpd")
        counts = scanner.scan_all(registry)
        registry.save()
        
        print(f"  {C.G}Scan complete!{C.E}")
        print(f"    Scripts discovered: {C.CY}{counts['scripts']}{C.E}")
        print(f"    Results found:      {C.CY}{counts['results']}{C.E}")
        print(f"    Organisms found:    {C.CY}{counts['organisms']}{C.E}")
        print(f"    Results linked:     {C.CY}{counts['linked']}{C.E}")
        
        total = len(registry.experiments)
        print(f"\n  {C.H}Total experiments in registry: {total}{C.E}")
        
        # Show type breakdown
        stats = registry.stats()
        if stats["by_type"]:
            print(f"\n  {C.H}By Type:{C.E}")
            for etype, count in sorted(stats["by_type"].items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):
                bar = "Ôľł" * min(count, 30)
                print(f"    {etype:20s} {C.CY}{bar}{C.E} {count}")
        print()
    
    # ÔöÇÔöÇ LIST ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    elif subcmd == "list":
        filter_type = args_list[0] if args_list else None
        exp_type = None
        if filter_type:
            try:
                exp_type = ExperimentType(filter_type)
            except ValueError:
                pass
        
        experiments = registry.list_all(exp_type=exp_type)
        if not experiments:
            print(f"\n  {C.Y}No experiments found. Run {C.H}osiris lab scan{C.E}{C.Y} first.{C.E}\n")
            return
        
        print(f"\n{C.H}  ­čöČ QUANTUM LAB ÔÇö Experiment Registry ({len(experiments)} experiments){C.E}")
        print(f"  {C.DIM}{'ÔöÇ' * 60}{C.E}\n")
        
        # Group by type
        by_type: Dict = {}
        for exp in experiments:
            key = exp.exp_type.value
            by_type.setdefault(key, []).append(exp)
        
        type_icons = {
            "bell_state": "­čöö", "ghz_state": "­čîÉ", "w_state": "­čöä",
            "theta_sweep": "­čôÉ", "theta_lock": "­čöĺ", "chi_pc": "¤ç",
            "aeterna_porta": "ÔÜŤ´ŞĆ", "dna_encoded": "­čžČ", "lambda_phi": "╬╗",
            "consciousness": "­čžá", "vacuum_energy": "ÔÜí", "teleportation": "­čîÇ",
            "error_mitigation": "­čŤí´ŞĆ", "entanglement": "­čöŚ", "ramsey": "­čôŐ",
            "custom": "­čöž",
        }
        status_colors = {
            "discovered": C.DIM, "cataloged": C.B, "designed": C.CY,
            "queued": C.Y, "running": C.M, "completed": C.G,
            "failed": C.R, "analyzed": C.G,
        }
        
        for etype, exps in sorted(by_type.items()):
            icon = type_icons.get(etype, "­čöČ")
            print(f"  {icon}  {C.H}{etype.upper()}{C.E} ({len(exps)})")
            for exp in exps[:8]:
                sc = status_colors.get(exp.status.value, C.E)
                has_results = f" [{len(exp.results)} results]" if exp.results else ""
                backends = f" Ôćĺ {', '.join(exp.backends[:2])}" if exp.backends else ""
                print(f"      {sc}[{exp.status.value:10s}]{C.E}  {exp.id[:10]}  {exp.name[:35]}{has_results}{backends}")
            if len(exps) > 8:
                print(f"      {C.DIM}... and {len(exps) - 8} more{C.E}")
            print()
    
    # ÔöÇÔöÇ TEMPLATES ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    elif subcmd == "templates":
        designer = ExperimentDesigner()
        templates = designer.list_templates()
        
        print(f"\n{C.H}  ­čöČ QUANTUM LAB ÔÇö Experiment Templates{C.E}")
        print(f"  {C.DIM}{'ÔöÇ' * 60}{C.E}\n")
        
        for i, tmpl in enumerate(templates, 1):
            print(f"  {C.CY}{i:2d}.{C.E} {C.H}{tmpl.name}{C.E}")
            print(f"      Type: {tmpl.exp_type}  |  Tags: {', '.join(tmpl.tags)}")
            print(f"      {C.DIM}{tmpl.description}{C.E}")
            params = ", ".join(f"{k}={v}" for k, v in list(tmpl.parameters.items())[:4])
            print(f"      Defaults: {C.DIM}{params}{C.E}")
            print()
        
        print(f"  {C.Y}Usage: {C.H}osiris lab design <template_name>{C.E}")
        print(f"  {C.DIM}Example: osiris lab design bell_state{C.E}")
        print(f"  {C.DIM}Example: osiris lab design theta_sweep{C.E}\n")
    
    # ÔöÇÔöÇ DESIGN ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    elif subcmd == "design":
        if not args_list:
            print(f"  {C.R}Usage: osiris lab design <template_name> [experiment_name]{C.E}")
            print(f"  {C.DIM}Run 'osiris lab templates' to see available templates{C.E}\n")
            return
        
        template_name = args_list[0]
        exp_name = args_list[1] if len(args_list) > 1 else None
        designer = ExperimentDesigner()
        
        output_dir = os.path.expanduser("~/.config/osiris/lab/experiments")
        
        try:
            filepath = designer.design(template_name, output_dir, experiment_name=exp_name)
            
            # Validate syntax
            executor = LabExecutor()
            validation = executor.dry_run(filepath)
            
            print(f"\n{C.H}  ­čöČ EXPERIMENT DESIGNED{C.E}")
            print(f"  {C.DIM}{'ÔöÇ' * 50}{C.E}")
            print(f"  Template: {C.CY}{template_name}{C.E}")
            print(f"  Script:   {C.G}{filepath}{C.E}")
            print(f"  Syntax:   {'Ôťů Valid' if validation['valid'] else 'ÔŁî ' + str(validation.get('error', ''))}")
            print(f"\n  {C.Y}To run: {C.H}osiris lab run {filepath}{C.E}")
            print(f"  {C.DIM}Or: osiris lab run {os.path.basename(filepath)}{C.E}\n")
            
            # Register in registry
            from dnalang_sdk.lab import ExperimentRecord
            record = ExperimentRecord(
                id=hashlib.md5(filepath.encode()).hexdigest()[:12],
                name=exp_name or template_name,
                exp_type=ExperimentType(designer.get_template(template_name).exp_type),
                status=ExperimentStatus.DESIGNED,
                script_path=filepath,
                description=f"Designed from template: {template_name}",
                tags=["designed", template_name],
            )
            registry.register(record)
            registry.save()
            
        except ValueError as e:
            print(f"  {C.R}{e}{C.E}\n")
    
    # ÔöÇÔöÇ RUN ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    elif subcmd == "run":
        if not args_list:
            print(f"  {C.R}Usage: osiris lab run <script_path|experiment_id>{C.E}\n")
            return
        
        target = args_list[0]
        script_path = None
        
        # Try as direct path
        if os.path.exists(target):
            script_path = target
        else:
            # Try in lab experiments dir
            lab_dir = os.path.expanduser("~/.config/osiris/lab/experiments")
            candidate = os.path.join(lab_dir, target)
            if os.path.exists(candidate):
                script_path = candidate
            else:
                # Try as experiment ID
                exp = registry.get(target)
                if exp and exp.script_path and os.path.exists(exp.script_path):
                    script_path = exp.script_path
                else:
                    # Search by name
                    matches = registry.search(target)
                    for m in matches:
                        if m.script_path and os.path.exists(m.script_path):
                            script_path = m.script_path
                            break
        
        if not script_path:
            print(f"  {C.R}Experiment not found: {target}{C.E}")
            print(f"  {C.DIM}Provide a script path, filename in lab dir, or experiment ID{C.E}\n")
            return
        
        print(f"\n{C.M}  ­čöČ EXECUTING EXPERIMENT{C.E}")
        print(f"  {C.DIM}{'ÔöÇ' * 50}{C.E}")
        print(f"  Script: {C.CY}{script_path}{C.E}")
        
        # Dry run first
        executor = LabExecutor()
        validation = executor.dry_run(script_path)
        if not validation["valid"]:
            print(f"  {C.R}Syntax error: {validation['error']}{C.E}\n")
            return
        
        print(f"  Syntax: Ôťů")
        print(f"  {C.Y}Running...{C.E}\n")
        
        result = executor.run(script_path, timeout=120)
        
        if result["success"]:
            print(f"  {C.G}ÔöüÔöüÔöü Output ÔöüÔöüÔöü{C.E}")
            for line in result["stdout"].strip().split("\n"):
                print(f"  {line}")
            print(f"  {C.G}ÔöüÔöüÔöüÔöüÔöüÔöüÔöüÔöüÔöüÔöüÔöüÔöüÔöüÔöü{C.E}")
            print(f"\n  Ôťů {C.G}Completed{C.E} in {result['duration_s']:.1f}s")
            if result["result_file"]:
                print(f"  ­čôŐ Results: {C.CY}{result['result_file']}{C.E}")
                # Show key metrics from results
                if result["result_data"]:
                    data = result["result_data"]
                    print(f"\n  {C.H}Key Metrics:{C.E}")
                    for key in ["fidelity", "concurrence", "entropy", "phi", "phi_total",
                                "best_angle", "peak_fidelity", "sovereign", "all_conserved"]:
                        if key in data:
                            print(f"    {key}: {C.CY}{data[key]}{C.E}")
                    if "summary" in data:
                        for k, v in data["summary"].items():
                            print(f"    {k}: {C.CY}{v}{C.E}")
        else:
            print(f"  {C.R}ÔöüÔöüÔöü Error ÔöüÔöüÔöü{C.E}")
            if result["stdout"]:
                for line in result["stdout"].strip().split("\n")[-10:]:
                    print(f"  {line}")
            if result["stderr"]:
                for line in result["stderr"].strip().split("\n")[-10:]:
                    print(f"  {C.R}{line}{C.E}")
            print(f"\n  ÔŁî {C.R}Failed{C.E} (exit code {result['exit_code']}) in {result['duration_s']:.1f}s")
        print()
    
    # ÔöÇÔöÇ RESULTS ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    elif subcmd == "results":
        target = args_list[0] if args_list else None
        
        if target:
            # Show specific experiment results
            exp = registry.get(target)
            if not exp:
                matches = registry.search(target)
                exp = matches[0] if matches else None
            
            if not exp:
                print(f"  {C.R}Experiment not found: {target}{C.E}\n")
                return
            
            print(f"\n{C.H}  ­čöČ Results: {exp.name}{C.E}")
            print(f"  {C.DIM}{'ÔöÇ' * 50}{C.E}")
            print(f"  Type: {exp.exp_type.value}  |  Status: {exp.status.value}")
            if exp.script_path:
                print(f"  Script: {C.DIM}{exp.script_path}{C.E}")
            
            if exp.results:
                for i, r in enumerate(exp.results, 1):
                    print(f"\n  {C.CY}Result {i}:{C.E} {r.result_path}")
                    print(f"    Size: {r.size_bytes:,} bytes")
                    if r.key_metrics:
                        for k, v in list(r.key_metrics.items())[:8]:
                            print(f"    {k}: {C.CY}{v}{C.E}")
            elif exp.key_findings:
                print(f"\n  {C.H}Key Findings:{C.E}")
                for k, v in list(exp.key_findings.items())[:10]:
                    print(f"    {k}: {C.CY}{v}{C.E}")
            else:
                print(f"\n  {C.DIM}No results available{C.E}")
            print()
        else:
            # Show all experiments with results
            with_results = [e for e in registry.list_all() if e.results or e.key_findings]
            print(f"\n{C.H}  ­čöČ Experiments with Results ({len(with_results)}){C.E}")
            print(f"  {C.DIM}{'ÔöÇ' * 50}{C.E}\n")
            for exp in with_results[:20]:
                n_results = len(exp.results)
                top_metric = ""
                if exp.key_findings:
                    for k in ["fidelity", "concurrence", "phi", "phi_total"]:
                        if k in exp.key_findings:
                            top_metric = f"  {k}={exp.key_findings[k]}"
                            break
                print(f"  {exp.id[:10]}  {exp.name[:30]:30s}  [{n_results} files]{top_metric}")
            print()
    
    # ÔöÇÔöÇ SEARCH ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    elif subcmd == "search":
        query = " ".join(args_list) if args_list else ""
        if not query:
            print(f"  {C.R}Usage: osiris lab search <query>{C.E}\n")
            return
        
        matches = registry.search(query)
        print(f"\n{C.H}  ­čöŹ Search: \"{query}\" ÔÇö {len(matches)} matches{C.E}\n")
        for exp in matches[:15]:
            print(f"  {exp.id[:10]}  [{exp.exp_type.value:15s}]  {exp.name}")
            if exp.script_path:
                print(f"    {C.DIM}{exp.script_path}{C.E}")
        print()
    
    # ÔöÇÔöÇ STATS ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    elif subcmd == "stats":
        stats = registry.stats()
        
        print(f"\n{C.H}  ­čôŐ QUANTUM LAB STATISTICS{C.E}")
        print(f"  {C.DIM}{'ÔöÇ' * 50}{C.E}")
        print(f"  Total experiments: {C.CY}{stats['total_experiments']}{C.E}")
        print(f"  Total results:     {C.CY}{stats['total_results']}{C.E}")
        
        if stats["by_type"]:
            print(f"\n  {C.H}By Type:{C.E}")
            max_count = max(stats["by_type"].values()) if stats["by_type"] else 1
            for etype, count in sorted(stats["by_type"].items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):
                bar_len = int(count / max_count * 25)
                bar = f"{C.CY}{'Ôľł' * bar_len}{'ÔľĹ' * (25 - bar_len)}{C.E}"
                print(f"    {etype:20s} {bar} {count}")
        
        if stats["by_status"]:
            print(f"\n  {C.H}By Status:{C.E}")
            for status, count in sorted(stats["by_status"].items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):
                print(f"    {status:15s} {count}")
        print()
    
    else:
        print(f"  {C.R}Unknown lab command: {subcmd}{C.E}")
        print(f"  {C.DIM}Available: scan, list, templates, design, run, results, search, stats{C.E}\n")

def main():
    try:
        p=argparse.ArgumentParser(
            description="OSIRIS - Quantum Development CLI v" + VERSION + " ÔÇö Generation 6.0 Cognitive Shell",
            epilog=f"""Commands:
  osiris                        Launch cognitive orchestration TUI ­čžá
  osiris tui                    Launch cognitive orchestration TUI ­čžá
  osiris chat                   Launch classic readline chat
  osiris dev [project]          Launch copilot dev mode
  osiris init                   SENTINEL intelligence scan
  osiris model                  Select model (includes NCLM)
  osiris aal [index]            Run AAL 6-stage pipeline
  osiris ccce                   Show consciousness metrics
  osiris quantum [circuit]      Execute quantum circuit
  osiris agent "task"           Run agent orchestration
  osiris OSIRIS [task]          Wormhole/quantum operations
  osiris AIDEN [task]           SECDEVOPS / integrity
  osiris AURA [task]            Code / development
  osiris deploy [env]           Deploy to environment
  ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ Gen 5.1 ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
  osiris pulse                  Live consciousness heartbeat ÔÖą
  osiris status                 Full system status dashboard
  osiris mesh                   Wormhole mesh topology
  osiris proof                  Generate sovereign proof ­čöÉ
  osiris threat ["content"]     SCIMITAR threat scan ­čŚí´ŞĆ
  osiris lazarus                Lazarus/Phoenix recovery diagnostic
  ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ Lab R&D ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
  osiris lab                    Quantum R&D Lab overview ­čöČ
  osiris lab scan               Discover experiments
  osiris lab list               List experiments
  osiris lab templates          Design templates
  osiris lab design <template>  Design new experiment
  osiris lab run <path>         Execute experiment
  osiris lab results            Browse results""",
            formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter)
        p.add_argument("cmd", nargs="?", help="Command")
        p.add_argument("args", nargs="*", help="Args")
        p.add_argument("--version", action="version", version=f"OSIRIS v{VERSION} ÔÇö dna::}}{{::lang v{THETA_LOCK}")
        p.add_argument("--model", "-m", help="Select model")
        a=p.parse_args()
        
        # Handle --model flag
        if a.model:
            cfg = load_config()
            if a.model in OSIRIS_MODELS:
                cfg["model"] = a.model
                save_config(cfg)
                print(f"{C.G}Ôťô Model set to: {OSIRIS_MODELS[a.model]['name']}{C.E}\n")
            else:
                print(f"{C.R}Unknown model: {a.model}{C.E}")
                print(f"Available: {', '.join(OSIRIS_MODELS.keys())}")
                return
        
        # If no command, launch TUI (full-screen cognitive shell)
        # "chat" launches classic readline mode, "tui" also launches TUI
        if not a.cmd or a.cmd == "tui":
            try:
                from dnalang_sdk.nclm.tui import run_tui
                run_tui()
            except ImportError:
                # Fallback to readline chat if textual not available
                chat()
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"  TUI failed ({e}), falling back to chat mode...")
                chat()
            return
        
        if a.cmd == "chat":
            chat()
            return

        # For all other commands, show the header + hints first
        header()
        cfg = load_config()
        projects = cfg.get("projects", [])
        if projects:
            print(f"  ­čĺí {C.H}osiris init{C.E} ÔÇö SENTINEL scan   {C.H}osiris pulse{C.E} ÔÇö live heartbeat   {C.H}osiris status{C.E} ÔÇö dashboard")
            print(f"     {C.DIM}[ACTIVE]{C.E}", end="")
            for i, pr in enumerate(projects[:3], 1):
                print(f"  {i}.) {pr['name']}", end="")
            print()
        else:
            print(f"  ­čĺí Run {C.H}osiris init{C.E} to scan for projects and initialize SENTINEL\n")
        print(f"  {C.H}osiris OSIRIS{C.E} quantum  |  {C.H}osiris AIDEN{C.E} security  |  {C.H}osiris AURA{C.E} code/dev")
        print(f"  {C.H}osiris pulse{C.E}  heartbeat  |  {C.H}osiris mesh{C.E} topology  |  {C.H}osiris threat{C.E} scan")
        print(f"  {C.H}osiris proof{C.E}  sovereign  |  {C.H}osiris lazarus{C.E} recovery  |  {C.H}osiris status{C.E} dashboard")
        print(f"  {C.H}osiris lab{C.E}    R&D mode   |  {C.H}osiris lab scan{C.E}             {C.H}osiris lab templates{C.E}")
        print(f"{C.DIM}{'Ôöü' * 70}{C.E}\n")

        cmd = a.cmd
        if cmd == "dev":      asyncio.run(dev(a.args[0] if a.args else None))
        elif cmd == "init":   asyncio.run(init_sentinel())
        elif cmd == "model":  model_cmd()
        elif cmd == "quantum": asyncio.run(quantum(a.args[0] if a.args else None))
        elif cmd == "agent":  asyncio.run(agent(a.args[0] if a.args else "test task"))
        elif cmd == "ccce":   asyncio.run(ccce())
        elif cmd == "aal":    asyncio.run(aal(a.args[0] if a.args else None))
        elif cmd == "deploy": asyncio.run(deploy(a.args[0] if a.args else "vercel"))
        elif cmd == "chat":   chat()
        # Gen 5.0 command aliases
        elif cmd == "OSIRIS": asyncio.run(cmd_osiris(a.args))
        elif cmd == "AIDEN":  asyncio.run(cmd_aiden(a.args))
        elif cmd == "AURA":   asyncio.run(cmd_aura(a.args))
        # Gen 5.1 new commands
        elif cmd == "pulse":   asyncio.run(cmd_pulse())
        elif cmd == "status":  asyncio.run(cmd_status())
        elif cmd == "mesh":    asyncio.run(cmd_mesh())
        elif cmd == "proof":   asyncio.run(cmd_proof())
        elif cmd == "threat":  asyncio.run(cmd_threat(" ".join(a.args) if a.args else None))
        elif cmd == "lazarus": asyncio.run(cmd_lazarus())
        elif cmd == "lab":    asyncio.run(cmd_lab(a.args[0] if a.args else None, a.args[1:] if len(a.args) > 1 else []))
        else: print(f"{C.R}Unknown command:{C.E} {cmd}"); p.print_help()
    except KeyboardInterrupt: print(f"\n{C.CY}Interrupted{C.E}")
    except Exception as e: print(f"\n{C.R}Error:{C.E} {e}"); import traceback; traceback.print_exc()

if __name__=="__main__": main() DNALang SDK Cookbook

Practical examples and recipes for using DNALang SDK with GitHub Copilot.
Structure

cookbook/dnalang/
ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ basic/              # Beginner-friendly examples
Ôöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ hello_quantum.py
ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ quantum/            # Quantum computing examples
Ôöé   ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ lambda_phi_demo.py
Ôöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ consciousness_scaling.py
ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ advanced/           # Advanced integration examples
    ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ ibm_deployment.py
    ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ backend_comparison.py

Prerequisites

# Install DNALang SDK
cd ../../dnalang
pip install -e ".[quantum]"

# Or install with all dependencies
pip install -e ".[quantum,dev]"

Quick Start
1. Hello Quantum (Basic)

Create and execute your first quantum circuit:

python basic/hello_quantum.py

Creates a Bell state and measures it. You'll see:

    Circuit construction with fluent API
    Execution on local simulator
    Measurement results visualization

Expected Output:

=== Hello Quantum! ===

Circuit: bell_state
Qubits: 2
Gates: 2

Executing circuit...

Success: True
Backend: aer_simulator
Execution Time: 0.123s

Measurement Counts:
  |00Ôčę:  512 (50.0%) ÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľł
  |11Ôčę:  512 (50.0%) ÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľłÔľł

Ôťô Bell state created successfully!

2. Lambda-Phi Conservation (Quantum)

Validate conservation laws in quantum circuits:

python quantum/lambda_phi_demo.py

Tests whether quantum operators are conserved under unitary evolution.

Key Concepts:

    Lambda-phi conservation laws
    Operator expectation values
    Statistical validation

3. Consciousness Scaling (Quantum)

Measure consciousness scaling across system sizes:

python quantum/consciousness_scaling.py

Demonstrates CCCE (Consciousness Collapse Coherence Evolution) measurements.

Key Concepts:

    Consciousness scaling exponent
    Coherence time estimation
    GHZ state preparation

Examples by Topic
Basic Quantum Computing
Example 	Description 	Difficulty
basic/hello_quantum.py 	Bell state creation 	Beginner
Lambda-Phi Conservation
Example 	Description 	Difficulty

Configuration

All examples can be configured via dnalang.config.json:

{
  "quantum": {
    "default_backend": "aer_simulator",
    "api_token_env": "IBM_QUANTUM_TOKEN",
    "optimization_level": 3,
    "shots": 1024
  },
  "lambda_phi": {
    "num_trials": 100,
    "significance_level": 0.05,
    "operators": ["X", "Y", "Z", "H"]
  },
  "consciousness": {
    "qubit_range": [2, 4, 8, 16, 32],
    "samples_per_size": 50,
    "coherence_threshold": 0.7
  }
}

Running Examples
Local Simulator (No API key required)

python basic/hello_quantum.py

IBM Quantum Hardware (Requires API key)

# Set your IBM Quantum API token
export IBM_QUANTUM_TOKEN="your_token_here"

# Run advanced examples
python advanced/ibm_deployment.py

Modifying Examples

Each example is self-contained and can be easily modified:

# Change circuit structure
circuit = client.create_quantum_circuit(num_qubits=5)
circuit.h(0)
for i in range(1, 5):
    circuit.cx(i-1, i)

# Change backend
result = await client.execute_quantum_circuit(
    circuit=circuit,
    backend="ibm_brisbane",  # Use real hardware
    shots=2048
)

# Change analysis parameters
result = await analyzer.measure_scaling(
    num_qubits_range=[2, 4, 8, 16, 32, 64],
    num_samples=100
)

Common Patterns
Creating Circuits

# Method 1: Using fluent API
circuit = client.create_quantum_circuit(num_qubits=3)
circuit.h(0).cx(0, 1).cx(1, 2)

# Method 2: Using gate list
circuit = client.create_quantum_circuit(
    num_qubits=3,
    gates=[
        {"type": "h", "target": 0},
        {"type": "cx", "control": 0, "target": 1},
        {"type": "cx", "control": 1, "target": 2}
    ]
)

Error Handling

try:
    result = await client.execute_quantum_circuit(circuit)
    if not result.success:
        print(f"Execution failed: {result.metadata.get('error')}")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error: {e}")

Async Context Manager

async with DNALangCopilotClient() as client:
    # Client automatically started
    result = await client.execute_quantum_circuit(circuit)
    # Client automatically closed

Troubleshooting
Import Errors

# Ensure DNALang SDK is installed
pip install -e ../../dnalang

# Install quantum dependencies
pip install qiskit qiskit-aer

IBM Quantum Connection Issues

# Verify API token is set
echo $IBM_QUANTUM_TOKEN

# Test connection
python -c "from qiskit_ibm_runtime import QiskitRuntimeService; print('OK')"

Slow Execution

    Use local simulator for testing: backend="aer_simulator"
    Reduce shots: shots=256
    Reduce trials: num_trials=10

Zero tokens. Zero telemetry. Pure sovereignty. """
Multi-Backend Comparison Example

Compare quantum circuit execution across different backends.
"""

import asyncio
import time
from dnalang_sdk import (
    DNALangCopilotClient,
    QuantumConfig,
)


async def run_on_backend(client, circuit, backend_name, shots=1024):
    """Run circuit on specified backend and return results."""
    start = time.time()
    
    try:
        result = await client.execute_quantum_circuit(
            circuit=circuit,
            backend=backend_name,
            shots=shots,
        )
        elapsed = time.time() - start
        
        return {
            "backend": backend_name,
            "success": result.success,
            "execution_time": elapsed,
            "counts": result.counts,
            "shots": result.shots,
        }
    except Exception as e:
        return {
            "backend": backend_name,
            "success": False,
            "error": str(e),
            "execution_time": time.time() - start,
        }


async def main():
    """Compare backends for quantum execution."""
    
    print("=== Multi-Backend Comparison ===\n")
    
    # Create client
    async with DNALangCopilotClient(
        quantum_config=QuantumConfig()
    ) as client:
        
        # Create test circuit (GHZ state)
        circuit = client.create_quantum_circuit(num_qubits=4, name="ghz_4")
        circuit.h(0)
        for i in range(1, 4):
            circuit.cx(0, i)
        
        print(f"Test Circuit: {circuit.name}")
        print(f"Qubits: {circuit.num_qubits}")
        print(f"Gates: {len(circuit.gates)}\n")
        
        # List of backends to compare
        backends = [
            "aer_simulator",           # Local simulator (fast)
            # "ibm_brisbane",          # IBM 127-qubit (requires token)
            # "ibm_kyoto",             # IBM 127-qubit (requires token)
        ]
        
        print("Running on backends...\n")
        
        # Run on all backends
        results = []
        for backend in backends:
            print(f"Testing {backend}...")
            result = await run_on_backend(client, circuit, backend, shots=1024)
            results.append(result)
            
            if result["success"]:
                print(f"  Ôťô Success ({result['execution_time']:.2f}s)")
            else:
                print(f"  ÔťŚ Failed: {result.get('error', 'Unknown')}")
        
        # Compare results
        print("\n=== Comparison ===\n")
        
        print("Performance:")
        print("-" * 60)
        for r in results:
            if r["success"]:
                print(f"  {r['backend']:20s}: {r['execution_time']:6.2f}s")
        
        print("\nMeasurement Statistics:")
        print("-" * 60)
        for r in results:
            if r["success"] and "counts" in r:
                # Expected states for GHZ: |0000Ôčę and |1111Ôčę
                all_zeros = '0' * 4
                all_ones = '1' * 4
                
                counts = r["counts"]
                total = sum(counts.values())
                
                prob_zeros = counts.get(all_zeros, 0) / total
                prob_ones = counts.get(all_ones, 0) / total
                coherence = prob_zeros + prob_ones
                
                print(f"\n  {r['backend']}:")
                print(f"    |0000Ôčę: {prob_zeros:.1%}")
                print(f"    |1111Ôčę: {prob_ones:.1%}")
                print(f"    Coherence: {coherence:.1%}")
        
        # Lambda-phi validation across backends
        print("\n=== Lambda-Phi Conservation ===\n")
        
        validator = client.create_lambda_phi_validator()
        
        for backend in ["aer_simulator"]:  # Only simulator for demo
            print(f"Validating on {backend}...")
            
            # Temporarily set backend
            client.quantum_config.default_backend = backend
            
            result = await validator.validate_conservation(
                circuit=circuit,
                operator="Z",
                num_trials=20,
            )
            
            status = "Ôťô CONSERVED" if result.conserved else "ÔťŚ NOT CONSERVED"
            print(f"  {status}")
            print(f"  Ratio: {result.conservation_ratio:.4f}")
        
        print("\n=== Analysis Complete ===")
        print("\nRecommendations:")
        print("ÔÇó Use aer_simulator for fast prototyping")
        print("ÔÇó Use IBM hardware for validation and publication")
        print("ÔÇó Monitor coherence metrics for noise characterization")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(main()) https://github.com/quantum-advantage/copilot-sdk-dnalang/tree/main/cookbook/dnalang/advanced
